name: Central Soya
description_short: Federal credit union serving employees of Bunge North America, Premiere Agri Technologies, and other regional employers in Indiana and Ohio, offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards.
description_long: Central Soya Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution headquartered in Decatur, Indiana, with a routing number of 274972980. Originally associated with Central Soya Co. Inc. (now Bunge North America), the credit union has expanded its field of membership to include employees from multiple regional employers including McMillen Mills, Premiere Agri Technologies, Ruan Transportation, City of Decatur, and several others, plus their families and retirees. The credit union operates on the cooperative principle of "People Helping People," positioning members as owners rather than customers. Central Soya FCU offers a full suite of consumer banking services including checking and savings accounts, share certificates (CDs), auto loans, credit cards, and tax season loan specials. The institution provides competitive auto loan rates with recent promotions advertising 3.49% APR for 36-72 months on vehicles 2022 or newer. They offer credit cards with low rates, no annual fee, and great benefits, plus payroll deduction and direct deposit options for eligible members. What distinguishes Central Soya FCU is its restricted membership model based on employment with specific sponsor organizations, creating a tight-knit community of members rather than serving the general public. This approach allows the credit union to tailor products and services to the needs of its specific membership base. The institution maintains physical presence in Decatur, IN with phone support available at 260-724-1338 and 877-392-5977, plus 24/7 credit card support at 855-510-0950. For consumers who qualify for membership, Central Soya FCU provides the typical credit union advantage of member-owned structure, competitive rates, and personalized service. However, the restricted field of membership means only eligible employees and their families can join, limiting accessibility compared to banks or open-membership credit unions.
services: Credit cards with no annual fee
pros: Member-owned cooperative structure means members are owners, not customers, with potential profit-sharing benefits
No annual fee on credit cards with competitive rates and rewards benefits
Competitive auto loan rates, currently 3.49% APR for 36-72 months on 2022+ vehicles
Payroll deduction and direct deposit available to most sponsor groups and Social Security recipients
Share certificates (CDs) available for savings and wealth-building
Dual phone lines with local and toll-free access (260-724-1338 or 877-392-5977)
cons: Restricted membership limited to employees of specific companies and their families—cannot join as general public
Limited physical branch locations (only Decatur, IN address provided)
No mention of online account opening or digital-first banking features on website
Website lacks detailed fee schedule, rate information, and product specifics
No evidence of national ATM network beyond listing ATM availability as a feature
best_for: Employees of Bunge North America, McMillen Mills, Premiere Agri Technologies, and other listed sponsor employers in Indiana and Ohio
Retirees and pensioners from eligible employers seeking member-owned banking with competitive rates
Immediate family members and spouses of current or deceased eligible members in Decatur, IN area
diagnosis: Central Soya FCU is best for employees and families of specific regional employers in Indiana and Ohio who qualify for membership and want competitive rates through a member-owned credit union. The main caveat is that membership is strictly limited by employment affiliation—you cannot open an account unless you work for one of their sponsor organizations or are a qualified family member.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Central Soya — Credit Union in DECATUR, IN | CreditDoc
meta_description: Central Soya — NCUA-insured credit union in DECATUR, IN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
